case_title: IN RE: PING CHING WONG et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-14-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION, 301, CROSS DEFENDANTS PING WONG, MU LAI, MICHAEL HOU, Y.C. SHAW AND LUCIA LAI'S MOTION TO STRIKE WEN TIEN CHANG'S CROSS COMPLAINT IS DENIED. THE MOTIONS WERE NOT TIMELY SERVED ON ALL PARTIES. IN ANY EVENT, CROSS-DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT CARRIED THEIR BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT THE ACTS COMPLAINED OF ARISE OUT OF PROTECTED CONDUCT, SINCE THEY ARE ALLEGED DEFAMATORY ACTS COMMITTED WITHIN A PRIVATE CLUB, CONCERNING THE INTERNAL AFFAIRS OF THAT CLUB. FOR THE RECORD, THE COURT REMINDED PARTIES THAT BRIEFS SUBMITTED IN EXCESS OF 10 PAGES SHOULD HAVE TABLE OF CONTENTS AND TABLE OF AUTHORITIES. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

THE MOTIONS WERE NOT TIMELY SERVED ON ALL PARTIES. FOR THE RECORD, THE COURT REMINDED PARTIES THAT BRIEFS SUBMITTED IN EXCESS OF 10 PAGES SHOULD HAVE TABLE OF CONTENTS AND TABLE OF AUTHORITIES. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-14-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. ARTHUR J. LIU OF INTER-PACIFIC LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. (510) 986-1198 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND CROSS-DEFENDANTS;
ATTY. EDWARD LIU, TEL. NO. 781-8251 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT & CROSS-COMPLAINANT KA YIN.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS -CROSS DEFENDANTS PING WONG, MU LAI, MICHAEL HOU, Y.C. SHAW AND LUCIA LAI'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS- COMPLAINANT WEN TIEN CHANG'S CROSS COMPLAINTS IS DENIED. THE MOTIONS WERE NOT TIMELY SERVED ON ALL PARTIES. IN ANY EVENT, CROSS-DEFENDANT'S HAVE NOT CARRIED THEIR BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT THE ACTS COMPLAINED OF ARISE OUT OF PROTECTED CONDUCT, SINCE THEY ARE ALLEGED DEFAMATORY ACTS COMMITTED WITHIN A PRIVATE CLUB, CONCERNING THE INTERNAL AFFAIRS OF THAT CLUB. FOR THE RECORD, THE COURT REMINDED PARTIES THAT BRIEFS SUBMITTED IN EXCESS OF 10 PAGES SHOULD HAVE TABLE OF CONTENTS AND TABLE OF AUTHORITIES. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB/PM
